title: libtiff security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[4.0.9-35]
- fix CVE-2025-9900: buffer underflow crash in TIFFReadRGBAImageOriented()
  (RHEL-112533)
full_text:
[4.0.9-35]
- fix CVE-2025-9900: buffer underflow crash in TIFFReadRGBAImageOriented()
  (RHEL-112533)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-19276.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-9900.html
